consistency.level_scaling: Level 18 feature is appropriate for a high-level class ability.

quality.clarity: The description is clear and directly states the mechanical benefit.
quality.utility: Extremely high utility, providing permanent advantage negation against the Rogue, which significantly improves survivability against coordinated or flank-heavy enemies.
quality.flavor: Fits the theme of an unmatched, evasive master.

mechanics.core_effect: Prevents attack rolls from having advantage against the character.
mechanics.condition: The effect is active unless the character is Incapacitated. This is a standard and well-understood condition.
mechanics.interaction_notes: This feature specifically negates one of the most common defensive debuffs (advantage on attacks), making it very powerful, especially in environments where flanking is common.

suggestions: No mechanical changes suggested; the feature is well-balanced for its level.
analysis.data_integrity: All fields present and correctly formatted.
